questions.question: What is the difference between a DFA and an NFA? Provide an example of each.
Design a Finite Automaton that recognizes the language of all strings of 0s and 1s that end with a 1. Explain the construction of the Finite Automaton and provide a diagram.
Compare and contrast a Finite Automaton with a Turing Machine. Provide examples of languages that can be recognized by each machine.
expectedPoints: comparison of Finite Automaton and Turing Machine
examples of languages recognized by each machine

questions.question: What are the applications of Finite Automata in computer science? Provide examples of how Finite Automata are used in text search and compiler design.
expectedPoints: examples of text search and compiler design

questions.question: Construct a DFA or NFA for the language of all strings of 0s and 1s that contain at least one 1. Explain the construction of the DFA or NFA and provide a diagram.
